---
draft: true
title: "Finding the best bracket for the Men's NCAA March Madness Tournament"
author: Alex Zajichek
date: "2027-03-10"
---

* Formulating a Bayesian model to identify the best bracket

Main questions:

1. Which bracket has the highest posterior probability (of all combinations)?

2. What is the _effective_ number of bracket combinations?
    + Based on finding the reduced set of bracket possibilities that account for nearly 100% of the posteriod probability space. 
    + What are the commonalities in those brackets?
